message:
fix: wire WhatsNewModal helm upgrade through useSelfUpgrade for navbar indicator (#9434)

The WhatsNewModal was bypassing the useSelfUpgrade hook for helm
upgrades, doing a raw fetch instead. This meant the global
upgradeState never transitioned from 'idle' to 'triggering', so the
UpdateIndicator in the navbar never showed the spinning cyan animation
during background upgrades. Now the helm path uses triggerUpgrade()
which sets the global state and drives the navbar spinner + polling.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
